# ═══════════════════════════════════════
# CrossBias — Python Dependencies
# ═══════════════════════════════════════
# pip install -r requirements.txt

# ── Core (모든 스크립트) ──
numpy

# ── API Batch (run_one_batch.py, run_batch.py) ──
openai                  # gpt-5-nano, gpt-4.1-mini
anthropic               # claude-sonnet-4.6, claude-haiku-4.5

# ── Open Source 로컬 추론 (run_one_experiment.py) ──
torch                   # CUDA 버전 권장
transformers            # AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
accelerate              # device_map="auto"

# ── SAE Analysis (run_sae_analysis.py) ──
sae-lens                # SAE.from_pretrained (GemmaScope)
huggingface_hub         # hf_hub_download (직접 npz fallback)

# ── Visualization (visualize.py) ──
matplotlib
